results.text: Frozen Corpse: Giant-sized weapon or Trinkets. Test Fortitude DR12 to loot.
Ancient Giant's Relic: Weapon, Item, or Rune. Jotnar will notice!
Abandoned Frost Drake Nest: Broken shells and one unhatched egg.
Cracked Ice Bridge: Test Wits DR12 to cross safely. Halfway, Test Swift DR14 or fall.
Mysterious Cave: Giant's hoard guarded by an ice trap (d6 damage).
Frozen Waterfall: Chamber with Trinkets, Runes, and a legendary weapon.
